## ELETTRA Landing Page - Project Setup Complete ✅

### Project Information
- **Company**: ELETTRA Engenharia & Soluções
- **Type**: React + TypeScript Landing Page
- **Framework**: Vite + React 18
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS
- **Animations**: Framer Motion
- **Icons**: Lucide React

### Development Server
- **URL**: http://localhost:5174/
- **Command**: `npm run dev`
- **Status**: Running

### Build & Deployment
- **Build Command**: `npm run build`
- **Preview Command**: `npm run preview`
- **Build Output**: `dist/`

### Key Features Implemented
✅ Modern Header with responsive navigation
✅ Hero Section with animations and CTAs
✅ About Section with Mission/Vision/Values
✅ Comprehensive Services Section (7 service categories)
✅ Highlight Section with strategic messaging
✅ Portfolio Section (ready for content)
✅ Contact Section with working form
✅ Footer with quick links and social media
✅ Floating WhatsApp button
✅ Scroll animations and microinteractions
✅ Mobile-first responsive design
✅ SEO meta tags and semantic HTML

### Color Scheme
- Primary Dark: #003366
- Primary Main: #0051BA
- Primary Light: #E3F2FF
- Secondary Green: #10B981
- Secondary Light Blue: #06B6D4
- Secondary Orange: #F59E0B
- Neutral Dark: #1F2937
- Neutral Light: #F3F4F6

### Project Structure
```
src/
├── components/        # React components
├── App.tsx           # Main app component
├── main.tsx          # Entry point
└── index.css         # Global styles
```

### Dependencies Installed
- react@18.2.0
- react-dom@18.2.0
- framer-motion@10.16.4
- lucide-react@0.263.1
- tailwindcss@3.3.6
- vite@5.0.0
- typescript@5.2.2
